---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible bug in marketo-auto-recon
title: '[bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: austinjgilbert
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Command run

```
# Paste the exact command (redact any credentials/tokens)
mse <command> [flags]
```

## Expected behavior

What did you expect to happen?

## Actual behavior

What actually happened? Include the full error output.

```
# Paste error output here
```

## Environment

- **Node.js version:** (`node --version`)
- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)
- **marketo-auto-recon version:** (`mse --version` or package.json version)
- **Marketo API region:** (e.g., `https://xxx-xxx-xxx.mktorest.com`)

## Reproduction steps

1. Step one
2. Step two
3. See error

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem (e.g., Marketo instance size, number of leads,
custom activity types present).

> **Note:** Never include Marketo credentials, API keys, or lead data in bug reports.
> Redact all sensitive values before posting.
